name: Screenshoot
author: tr0z
description: Press a key to stitch every camera in the current room into one seamless full-room screenshot. Unlike naive stitchers, each pixel comes from exactly one camera (the nearest that covers it), so there is no doubling or ghosting where cameras overlap. Two modes: a clean shot of just the room geometry (no creatures, player or HUD), or a live shot of the full scene (creatures, player, weather) with the HUD hidden. Hotkeys, output folder and quality are configurable in the Remix menu.
